methodsAttempted.query: site:itb.ac.id (ChatGPT OR generative AI OR kecerdasan buatan OR Artificial Intelligence) (policy OR guideline OR akademik OR pembelajaran OR assessment) Institut Teknologi Bandung
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official FITB page on AI use for academic activity based on ITB AI guidance, an ITB news explainer about ChatGPT, an ITB legal-information item on an AI study program, a thesis PDF, and a FITB page reposting national AI guidance.

methodsAttempted.query: AI, kecerdasan buatan, ChatGPT on itb.ac.id search
methodsAttempted.notes: The central ITB search page is rendered through Google CSE JavaScript and static HTTP returned the search shell rather than usable result records.
The central ITB robots.txt allowed crawling except PDF paths; FITB robots.txt allowed all. Official AI-policy evidence was retained only from accessible HTML pages.

artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery found one accessible, policy-specific FITB guidance page on AI use in academic activity. The page states that it follows ITB AI guidance, but the linked Edunex guide did not return content within the fetch timeout and was not used as evidence. ITB news, thesis, and external/national guidance pages were not used for ITB policy claims.

targets.sourceTitle: Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan (Artificial Intelligence) untuk kegiatan Akademik di FITB

stopConditions: Stop after accessible official sources support narrow FITB-scoped claims.
Do not infer binding ITB-wide policy from a faculty page when the direct Edunex policy URL is inaccessible.
Do not use news explainers, theses, external national guidance, or search snippets as evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan (Artificial Intelligence) untuk kegiatan Akademik di FITB

artifacts.claimText: FITB guidance says AI may be used as an aid in the learning process, while understanding, argumentation, analysis, and academic decisions remain human responsibilities.

citation.citationTitle: Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan (Artificial Intelligence) untuk kegiatan Akademik di FITB
citation.publisher: Fakultas Ilmu dan Teknologi Kebumian, Institut Teknologi Bandung
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: FITB guidance states that, by default, using AI during exams, quizzes, or other evaluations is academic cheating and can be sanctioned unless the instructor allows or recommends AI use for a particular part of a course.

citation.citationTitle: Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan (Artificial Intelligence) untuk kegiatan Akademik di FITB
citation.publisher: Fakultas Ilmu dan Teknologi Kebumian, Institut Teknologi Bandung
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: FITB guidance says students may not submit final academic work entirely generated by AI without original contribution.

citation.citationTitle: Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan (Artificial Intelligence) untuk kegiatan Akademik di FITB
citation.publisher: Fakultas Ilmu dan Teknologi Kebumian, Institut Teknologi Bandung
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: FITB guidance says students are prohibited from entering personal, sensitive, and confidential data into GenAI and are prohibited from using deepfakes for disinformation or manipulation.

artifacts.claimText: FITB guidance says declaration of AI use for coursework outputs is mandatory rather than optional, and undeclared AI use may be considered a serious violation with academic consequences.

artifacts.claimText: FITB guidance says instructors need to set AI-use policies for their courses and communicate them at the start of the course; when AI use is allowed, permission should be clear and explicit, with boundaries and transparency.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Deklarasi penggunaan AI adalah wajib, bukan opsional. artifacts.notes: Approved as FITB-scoped guidance; source directly supports AI as a learning aid with human academic responsibility.
Approved because the source uses default cheating and sanction language for AI use during evaluations, with instructor-permission exceptions.
Approved as narrow FITB guidance on final academic work and original contribution.
Approved because the source directly prohibits entering personal, sensitive, and confidential data into GenAI and using deepfakes for disinformation or manipulation.
Approved because the source directly states that AI-use declaration is mandatory and undeclared use may be a serious violation with academic consequences.
Approved as teaching guidance; the source directly supports instructor course-policy and communication wording.

artifacts.title: Institut Teknologi Bandung staged AI policy source review
artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery for Institut Teknologi Bandung found an accessible FITB guidance page on AI use in academic activity. Six agent-reviewed claim candidates were staged, all scoped to FITB guidance because the directly linked ITB Edunex policy/guidance URL was inaccessible during this crawl.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The accessible evidence source is published by FITB, so claim text is scoped to FITB guidance rather than asserted as a binding ITB-wide policy.
The linked Edunex ITB AI policy/guidance URL timed out during HTTP access and was not used as evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
